order: SHARED.md sec 7 -- contract parses 32-byte big-endian Fr in this exact order

public_inputs.name: order_commitment
public_inputs.description: Order to cancel (must be in active set).

public_inputs.name: refund_commitment
public_inputs.description: Balance note returning the locked funds (20 quote).

public_inputs.name: refund_asset_id
public_inputs.description: Asset refunded (buy -> quote asset; here id 1).
